faq_0_a: AskBiz is an AI-powered business intelligence tool for SME founders. You connect your Shopify, Amazon, TikTok Shop, or QuickBooks account, then ask questions in plain English and get clear answers grounded in your actual data.
faq_1_a: AskBiz has a free plan with 10 questions per month, a Growth plan at £19/month with unlimited questions and all core features, and a Business plan at £39/month with team seats, Decision Memory, Competitor Watch, and CFO Mode. All plans include API access.
faq_2_q: What data sources does AskBiz support?
faq_2_a: AskBiz connects to Shopify, Amazon FBA, TikTok Shop, Instagram Shopping, Pinterest, Stripe, QuickBooks, Google Sheets, and Square. You can also upload CSV and Excel files directly.
faq_3_q: What is the Business Pulse score?
faq_3_a: The Business Pulse score is a 0–100 health rating for your business, calculated from five components: margin health, revenue trend, stock position, cash flow, and product mix. It updates every time you sync your connected stores.
faq_4_q: Does AskBiz include a Point of Sale system?
faq_4_a: Yes — AskBiz includes a full Point of Sale system with register checkout, barcode scanning, inventory management, staff shift tracking, digital receipts, multi-branch support, tax compliance, GDPR tools, and integrations with Xero and QuickBooks. The PoS costs £5 per seat per month and is available on all plans.
faq_5_q: Is AskBiz suitable for small businesses?
faq_5_a: Yes — AskBiz is built specifically for SME founders, solo sellers, and small business owners who need business intelligence without a data team. No technical knowledge required.
faq_6_a: Your data is encrypted at rest and in transit. We never use your business data to train AI models. UK data residency with SOC 2-aligned controls.
hero_eyebrow: POS · Inventory · AI Intelligence — One Platform
hero_subtitle: AskBiz is your POS, real-time inventory, and AI business intelligence in one. Point your camera to sell. Ask in plain English to understand your numbers. No training. No setup. Just plug in and go.

compare_subtitle: Most small businesses pay separately for a POS, a BI tool, and an inventory system. AskBiz is all three — starting free.
compare_0_verdict: Great if online store is your primary channel. You still need Power BI or similar for real insights.
compare_1_pro_4: BI built in — no extra tool
compare_1_verdict: Best for shop + online owners who want one platform that sells, tracks stock, and explains what’s happening — without three subscriptions.
compare_2_con_1: Requires a data team to set up
compare_2_con_3: Days to weeks to get running
compare_2_verdict: Right for companies with a dedicated analyst. Wrong if you want to know your margin before lunch.
